_HometaxSimplifiedOutput.description:
Placeholder output schema.

Real shape tracks the 마이데이터 표준동의서 v240930 spec. Mock returns a
synthetic fixture stamped with the six transparency fields.
_HometaxSimplifiedOutput.title: _HometaxSimplifiedOutput

description:
Input schema for mock_lookup_module_hometax_simplified.

Pydantic v2 strict model (extra='forbid', frozen=True).

resident_id_prefix.description: 주민등록번호 앞 6자리 (first six digits of resident ID). Used to scope the simplified data query in Mock mode.
resident_id_prefix.title: Resident Id Prefix

year.description: 귀속 연도 (year of income attribution). Example: 2024 for the 2024 tax year (신고 기한: 2025-05).
year.title: Year

title: mock_lookup_module_hometax_simplified
